title: Role representations
description: Schema for shared/representations.csv. A representation is the selected way an active role is modeled. Validation must enforce exactly one selected representation for each active role.

representation_id.description: Stable identifier for this representation option.

representation_kind.description: Representation kind. Direct bundles expose methods. Decompositions activate child roles through role_decomposition_edges.csv.

representation_label.description: Human-readable label for this representation option.

description.description: Plain-language description of what this representation covers.

is_default.description: True when this is the default representation for the role. Validation must find exactly one default representation for every required role.

direct_method_kind.description: Expected method kind for direct bundles. Leave blank for role_decomposition because its child roles expose their own methods.

notes.description: Implementation or migration notes for this representation.
